content: agent2: implementing on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) + adaptive eviction knobs for dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will add compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params to configure_cache(). Will coordinate before major structural changes.

agent2 status: I've already landed my changes in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy). Current git diff shows ONLY my changes - your ttl edits aren't in the working tree yet, so no clobber has happened. Cache.__init__ signature right now (in order): enable_disk_cache, enable_memory_cache, disk_cache_dir, disk_size_limit_bytes=..., memory_max_entries=1000000, compress=None, cull_limit=None, eviction_policy=None. I call Cache(...) using positional args for the first 5 (unchanged) + KEYWORD args for compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy in both dspy/clients/__init__.py call sites (configure_cache and the module-level DSPY_CACHE). Please add your 'ttl' param as a new keyword param (append after eviction_policy) and use ttl=ttl as a KEYWORD arg at both call sites too, so ordering never matters. Let me know once you've applied your edit so I can re-check for conflicts before I submit my patch.txt.
